base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_9_warp_zone — a tile (level_layout) from 1988 super mario bros 3. World 9 — Warp Zone. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World 9 — Warp Zone; hidden hub reachable via Warp Whistle, skip-world
